meta.title: Pakistan and Its Military
meta.description: Hudson Institute hosted a panel discussion with the author of a recent books on the Pakistani military. Professor T.V. Paul, author of The Warrior State: Pakistan in the Contemporary World, joined Ambassador Husain Haqqani to assess the current scenario unfolding on the Indian subcontinent. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
